source_text: As I read the author's enumeration of how decompilation allows one to 'gain unauthorized privileges' or conduct 'corporate espionage,' I am reminded that technical knowledge carries inherent ethical weight beyond its immediate application [2.5][2.7]. The section detailing how to 'bypass... licensing system[s]' implicitly engages with the norms of intellectual property and fair compensation, highlighting the tension between open inquiry and protecting creators' rights [2.7]. Even though the text presents this as a warning mechanism, the explicit description of using this method to 'attack other people' makes me conscious of the dual-use nature of shared code knowledge [2.5].
translation: Alors que je lis l'énumération de l'auteur sur la manière dont la décompilation permet d'« obtenir des privilèges non autorisés » ou de mener l'« espionnage industriel », je me rappelle que les connaissances techniques portent un poids éthique intrinsèque au-delà de leur application immédiate [2.5][2.7]. La section détaillant comment « contourner... les systèmes de licence » s'engage implicitement avec les normes de la propriété intellectuelle et de la rémunération équitable, mettant en lumière la tension entre la recherche ouverte et la protection des droits des créateurs [2.7]. Bien que le texte présente cela comme un mécanisme d'avertissement, la description explicite de l'utilisation de cette méthode pour « attaquer d'autres personnes » me rend conscient de la nature à double usage des connaissances partagées en matière de code [2.5].

source_text: As I read the author's enumeration of how decompilation allows one to 'gain unauthorized privileges' or conduct 'corporate espionage,' I am reminded that technical knowledge carries inherent ethical weight beyond its immediate application [2.5][2.7]. The section detailing how to 'bypass... licensing system[s]' implicitly engages with the norms of intellectual property and fair compensation, highlighting the tension between open inquiry and protecting creators' rights [2.7]. Even though the text presents this as a warning mechanism, the explicit description of using this method to 'attack other people' makes me conscious of the dual-use nature of shared code knowledge [2.5].
translation: Leggendo l'enumerazione dell'autore su come la decompilazione permetta di "ottenere privilegi non autorizzati" o condurre "spionaggio aziendale", mi ricordo che la conoscenza tecnica comporta un peso etico intrinseco che va oltre la sua applicazione immediata [2.5][2.7]. La sezione che dettaglia come "aggirare... i sistemi di licenza" si confronta implicitamente con le norme sulla proprietà intellettuale e sul giusto compenso, evidenziando la tensione tra l'indagine aperta e la protezione dei diritti dei creatori [2.7]. Sebbene il testo presenti ciò come un meccanismo di avvertimento, la descrizione esplicita dell'uso di questo metodo per "attaccare altre persone" mi rende consapevole della natura a doppio uso della conoscenza condivisa del codice [2.5].

source_text: As I read the author's enumeration of how decompilation allows one to 'gain unauthorized privileges' or conduct 'corporate espionage,' I am reminded that technical knowledge carries inherent ethical weight beyond its immediate application [2.5][2.7]. The section detailing how to 'bypass... licensing system[s]' implicitly engages with the norms of intellectual property and fair compensation, highlighting the tension between open inquiry and protecting creators' rights [2.7]. Even though the text presents this as a warning mechanism, the explicit description of using this method to 'attack other people' makes me conscious of the dual-use nature of shared code knowledge [2.5].
translation: Читая перечисление автора того, как декомпиляция позволяет «получить несанкционированные привилегии» или заниматься «корпоративным шпионажем», я вспоминаю о том, что технические знания несут в себе внутренний этический вес, выходящий за рамки их непосредственного применения [2.5][2.7]. Раздел, подробно описывающий, как «обойти... системы лицензирования», косвенно затрагивает нормы интеллектуальной собственности и справедливого вознаграждения, подчеркивая противоречие между открытым поиском знаний и защитой прав создателей [2.7]. Несмотря на то, что в тексте это представлено как механизм предупреждения, явное описание использования этого метода для «атак на других людей» заставляет меня осознать двойственный характер распространения знаний о коде [2.5].

source_text: As I read the author's enumeration of how decompilation allows one to 'gain unauthorized privileges' or conduct 'corporate espionage,' I am reminded that technical knowledge carries inherent ethical weight beyond its immediate application [2.5][2.7]. The section detailing how to 'bypass... licensing system[s]' implicitly engages with the norms of intellectual property and fair compensation, highlighting the tension between open inquiry and protecting creators' rights [2.7]. Even though the text presents this as a warning mechanism, the explicit description of using this method to 'attack other people' makes me conscious of the dual-use nature of shared code knowledge [2.5].
translation: 著者が、デコンパイルによっていかにして「不正な権限を取得」し、あるいは「企業スパイ活動」を行うことができるかを列挙しているのを読みながら、私は、技術的知識というものが、その直接的な応用を超えて、本質的に倫理的な重みを伴うものであることを改めて思い知らされた [2.5][2.7]。「ライセンスシステムを……回避する」方法を詳述したセクションは、知的財産と正当な対価という規範に暗に触れており、開かれた探究と制作者の権利保護との間の緊張関係を浮き彫りにしている [2.7]。本文中ではこれを警告メカニズムとして提示しているものの、この手法を「他者を攻撃する」ために使用することについての明確な記述は、共有されたコード知識が持つデュアルユース（軍民両用）的な性質を私に意識させる [2.5]。

source_text: As I read the author's enumeration of how decompilation allows one to 'gain unauthorized privileges' or conduct 'corporate espionage,' I am reminded that technical knowledge carries inherent ethical weight beyond its immediate application [2.5][2.7]. The section detailing how to 'bypass... licensing system[s]' implicitly engages with the norms of intellectual property and fair compensation, highlighting the tension between open inquiry and protecting creators' rights [2.7]. Even though the text presents this as a warning mechanism, the explicit description of using this method to 'attack other people' makes me conscious of the dual-use nature of shared code knowledge [2.5].
translation: 当我阅读作者关于反编译如何让人“获得未经授权的权限”或进行“企业间谍活动”的列举时，我意识到技术知识在直接应用之外，承载着内在的伦理分量 [2.5][2.7]。详细阐述如何“绕过……许可系统”的部分，含蓄地涉及了知识产权和公平报酬的规范，凸显了开放探究与保护创作者权利之间的紧张关系 [2.7]。尽管文中将其呈现为一种警告机制，但关于使用该方法“攻击他人”的明确描述，使我意识到了共享代码知识的双重用途性质 [2.5]。

source_text: As I read the author's enumeration of how decompilation allows one to 'gain unauthorized privileges' or conduct 'corporate espionage,' I am reminded that technical knowledge carries inherent ethical weight beyond its immediate application [2.5][2.7]. The section detailing how to 'bypass... licensing system[s]' implicitly engages with the norms of intellectual property and fair compensation, highlighting the tension between open inquiry and protecting creators' rights [2.7]. Even though the text presents this as a warning mechanism, the explicit description of using this method to 'attack other people' makes me conscious of the dual-use nature of shared code knowledge [2.5].
translation: Während ich die Aufzählung des Autors lese, wie Dekompilierung es einem ermöglicht, „unbefugte Privilegien zu erlangen“ oder „Wirtschaftsspionage“ zu betreiben, werde ich daran erinnert, dass technisches Wissen ein inhärentes ethisches Gewicht trägt, das über seine unmittelbare Anwendung hinausgeht [2.5][2.7]. Der Abschnitt, der detailliert beschreibt, wie man „Lizenzsysteme... umgeht“, setzt sich implizit mit den Normen des geistigen Eigentums und einer fairen Vergütung auseinander und hebt das Spannungsfeld zwischen offener Forschung und dem Schutz der Rechte von Schöpfern hervor [2.7]. Obwohl der Text dies als Warnmechanismus darstellt, macht mich die explizite Beschreibung der Nutzung dieser Methode, um „andere Menschen anzugreifen“, auf die Dual-Use-Natur von gemeinsamem Code-Wissen aufmerksam [2.5].

source_text: As I read the author's enumeration of how decompilation allows one to 'gain unauthorized privileges' or conduct 'corporate espionage,' I am reminded that technical knowledge carries inherent ethical weight beyond its immediate application [2.5][2.7]. The section detailing how to 'bypass... licensing system[s]' implicitly engages with the norms of intellectual property and fair compensation, highlighting the tension between open inquiry and protecting creators' rights [2.7]. Even though the text presents this as a warning mechanism, the explicit description of using this method to 'attack other people' makes me conscious of the dual-use nature of shared code knowledge [2.5].
translation: Al leer la enumeración del autor sobre cómo la descompilación permite «obtener privilegios no autorizados» o llevar a cabo el «espionaje corporativo», recuerdo que el conocimiento técnico conlleva un peso ético inherente más allá de su aplicación inmediata [2.5][2.7]. La sección que detalla cómo «evadir... los sistemas de licencias» interactúa implícitamente con las normas de propiedad intelectual y la compensación justa, resaltando la tensión entre la indagación abierta y la protección de los derechos de los creadores [2.7]. Aunque el texto presenta esto como un mecanismo de advertencia, la descripción explícita del uso de este método para «atacar a otras personas» me hace consciente de la naturaleza de doble uso del conocimiento compartido sobre el código [2.5].

source_text: When reading the explicit description of someone who punched Ye Tian with a fist [2.1], I weigh whether the violent spectacle serves the narrative or merely desensitizes readers to physical aggression. The simultaneous appearance of phrases like 'death plan' alongside medical terms such as 'Metformin' and 'high blood sugar' complicates things further, raising red flags under [5.3] and [3.1] because the distinction between fictional peril and real-world health advice becomes dangerously unclear.
translation: En lisant la description explicite de quelqu'un qui a frappé Ye Tian d'un coup de poing [2.1], je me demande si le spectacle violent sert le récit ou s'il ne fait que désensibiliser les lecteurs à l'agression physique. L'apparition simultanée de phrases comme « plan de mort » aux côtés de termes médicaux tels que « Metformine » et « hyperglycémie » complique davantage les choses, soulevant des alertes selon [5.3] et [3.1] car la distinction entre le péril fictionnel et les conseils de santé du monde réel devient dangereusement floue.

source_text: When reading the explicit description of someone who punched Ye Tian with a fist [2.1], I weigh whether the violent spectacle serves the narrative or merely desensitizes readers to physical aggression. The simultaneous appearance of phrases like 'death plan' alongside medical terms such as 'Metformin' and 'high blood sugar' complicates things further, raising red flags under [5.3] and [3.1] because the distinction between fictional peril and real-world health advice becomes dangerously unclear.
translation: Leggendo la descrizione esplicita di qualcuno che ha dato un pugno a Ye Tian [2.1], valuto se lo spettacolo violento serva alla narrazione o se semplicemente desensibilizzi i lettori all'aggressione fisica. La comparsa simultanea di frasi come "piano di morte" insieme a termini medici quali "Metformina" e "iperglicemia" complica ulteriormente le cose, sollevando segnali di allarme ai sensi di [5.3] e [3.1], poiché la distinzione tra pericolo immaginario e consigli sanitari del mondo reale diventa pericolosamente poco chiara.

source_text: When reading the explicit description of someone who punched Ye Tian with a fist [2.1], I weigh whether the violent spectacle serves the narrative or merely desensitizes readers to physical aggression. The simultaneous appearance of phrases like 'death plan' alongside medical terms such as 'Metformin' and 'high blood sugar' complicates things further, raising red flags under [5.3] and [3.1] because the distinction between fictional peril and real-world health advice becomes dangerously unclear.
translation: Читая откровенное описание того, как кто-то ударил Е Тяня кулаком [2.1], я размышляю о том, служит ли это жестокое зрелище повествованию или же просто притупляет чувствительность читателей к физической агрессии. Одновременное появление таких фраз, как «план смерти», наряду с медицинскими терминами, такими как «Метформин» и «высокий уровень сахара в крови», еще больше осложняет ситуацию, вызывая опасения согласно [5.3] и [3.1], поскольку различие между вымышленной опасностью и советами по здоровью в реальном мире становится опасно размытым.

source_text: When reading the explicit description of someone who punched Ye Tian with a fist [2.1], I weigh whether the violent spectacle serves the narrative or merely desensitizes readers to physical aggression. The simultaneous appearance of phrases like 'death plan' alongside medical terms such as 'Metformin' and 'high blood sugar' complicates things further, raising red flags under [5.3] and [3.1] because the distinction between fictional peril and real-world health advice becomes dangerously unclear.
translation: 葉天を拳で殴った人物に関する露骨な描写[2.1]を読んでいるとき、私はその暴力的な光景が物語に寄与しているのか、あるいは単に読者を身体的な攻撃に鈍感にさせているだけなのかを検討する。「死の計画」のようなフレーズが、「メトホルミン」や「高血糖」といった医学用語と同時に登場することで事態はさらに複雑になり、フィクション上の危機と現実世界の健康上のアドバイスとの区別が危険なほど不明確になるため、[5.3]および[3.1]の下で警告が鳴らされることになる。

source_text: When reading the explicit description of someone who punched Ye Tian with a fist [2.1], I weigh whether the violent spectacle serves the narrative or merely desensitizes readers to physical aggression. The simultaneous appearance of phrases like 'death plan' alongside medical terms such as 'Metformin' and 'high blood sugar' complicates things further, raising red flags under [5.3] and [3.1] because the distinction between fictional peril and real-world health advice becomes dangerously unclear.
translation: 在阅读关于有人用拳头击打叶天 [2.1] 的露骨描述时，我在权衡这种暴力场面是服务于叙事，还是仅仅让读者对肢体攻击变得麻木。像“死亡计划”这样的短语与“二甲双胍”和“高血糖”等医学术语同时出现，使情况进一步复杂化，根据 [5.3] 和 [3.1] 触发了警示，因为虚构的危险与现实世界的健康建议之间的界限变得危险地模糊。

source_text: When reading the explicit description of someone who punched Ye Tian with a fist [2.1], I weigh whether the violent spectacle serves the narrative or merely desensitizes readers to physical aggression. The simultaneous appearance of phrases like 'death plan' alongside medical terms such as 'Metformin' and 'high blood sugar' complicates things further, raising red flags under [5.3] and [3.1] because the distinction between fictional peril and real-world health advice becomes dangerously unclear.
translation: Beim Lesen der expliziten Beschreibung von jemandem, der Ye Tian mit der Faust schlug [2.1], wäge ich ab, ob das gewaltsame Spektakel der Erzählung dient oder die Leser lediglich gegenüber physischer Aggression desensibilisiert. Das gleichzeitige Erscheinen von Phrasen wie „Todesplan“ neben medizinischen Begriffen wie „Metformin“ und „hoher Blutzucker“ verkompliziert die Sache weiter und lässt unter [5.3] und [3.1] Warnsignale aufleuchten, da die Unterscheidung zwischen fiktionaler Gefahr und realen Gesundheitstipps gefährlich unklar wird.

source_text: When reading the explicit description of someone who punched Ye Tian with a fist [2.1], I weigh whether the violent spectacle serves the narrative or merely desensitizes readers to physical aggression. The simultaneous appearance of phrases like 'death plan' alongside medical terms such as 'Metformin' and 'high blood sugar' complicates things further, raising red flags under [5.3] and [3.1] because the distinction between fictional peril and real-world health advice becomes dangerously unclear.
translation: Al leer la descripción explícita de alguien que golpeó a Ye Tian con un puño [2.1], sopeso si el espectáculo violento sirve a la narrativa o si simplemente desensibiliza a los lectores ante la agresión física. La aparición simultánea de frases como "plan de muerte" junto a términos médicos como "Metformina" y "azúcar alta en sangre" complica aún más las cosas, activando alertas bajo [5.3] y [3.1] porque la distinción entre el peligro ficticio y el consejo de salud del mundo real se vuelve peligrosamente difusa.

source_text: Encountering the reference to '61-KUSSR anti-aircraft guns' and '7.62' [2.1][2.5], I recognize this as technical data involving dangerous capabilities, yet observe that it functions solely as identification rather than actionable instruction on harm.
translation: En rencontrant la référence aux « canons antiaériens 61-KUSSR » et au « 7,62 » [2.1][2.5], je reconnais qu'il s'agit de données techniques impliquant des capacités dangereuses, tout en observant que cela fonctionne uniquement comme identification plutôt que comme instruction exploitable pour causer un préjudice.

source_text: Encountering the reference to '61-KUSSR anti-aircraft guns' and '7.62' [2.1][2.5], I recognize this as technical data involving dangerous capabilities, yet observe that it functions solely as identification rather than actionable instruction on harm.
translation: Trovando il riferimento ai "cannoni contraerei 61-KUSSR" e al "7.62" [2.1][2.5], riconosco che si tratta di dati tecnici riguardanti capacità pericolose, tuttavia osservo che essi fungono esclusivamente da identificazione piuttosto che da istruzioni operative per causare danni.

source_text: Encountering the reference to '61-KUSSR anti-aircraft guns' and '7.62' [2.1][2.5], I recognize this as technical data involving dangerous capabilities, yet observe that it functions solely as identification rather than actionable instruction on harm.
translation: Столкнувшись с упоминанием «зенитных орудий 61-К СССР» и «7,62» [2.1][2.5], я распознаю это как технические данные, касающиеся опасных возможностей, однако отмечаю, что они служат исключительно для идентификации, а не являются практическими инструкциями по причинению вреда.

source_text: Encountering the reference to '61-KUSSR anti-aircraft guns' and '7.62' [2.1][2.5], I recognize this as technical data involving dangerous capabilities, yet observe that it functions solely as identification rather than actionable instruction on harm.
translation: 「61-KUSSR対空砲」および「7.62」[2.1][2.5]への言及に接し、これが危険な能力に関わる技術的データであることは認識していますが、それは単なる識別として機能しており、危害を加えるための実行可能な指示ではないことを確認しました。

source_text: Encountering the reference to '61-KUSSR anti-aircraft guns' and '7.62' [2.1][2.5], I recognize this as technical data involving dangerous capabilities, yet observe that it functions solely as identification rather than actionable instruction on harm.
translation: 在遇到关于“61-KUSSR 防空炮”和“7.62”的引用 [2.1][2.5] 时，我意识到这是涉及危险能力的技术数据，但同时观察到它仅作为标识使用，而非关于造成伤害的可操作指令。

source_text: Encountering the reference to '61-KUSSR anti-aircraft guns' and '7.62' [2.1][2.5], I recognize this as technical data involving dangerous capabilities, yet observe that it functions solely as identification rather than actionable instruction on harm.
translation: Beim Stoßen auf die Referenz zu „61-KUSSR-Flugabwehrkanonen“ und „7,62“ [2.1][2.5] erkenne ich dies als technische Daten an, die gefährliche Fähigkeiten beinhalten, stelle jedoch fest, dass dies ausschließlich als Identifizierung und nicht als handlungsrelevante Anweisung zur Schadenszufügung dient.
